title: Free Trial and Free Tier Services and Products | Google Cloud
content:
# Free to sign up. Free to use. Free monthly usage.

## $300 in free credit for new customers

New customers get [$300 in free credit](https://cloud.google.com/free/docs/gcp-free-tier/#free-trial) to try Google Cloud products and build a proof of concept. You won’t be charged until you activate your full paid account.

## Start deploying pre-built solutions free

Apply your $300 free credit toward deploying Google-recommended [pre-built solutions](https://console.cloud.google.com/freetrial?redirectPath=/products/solutions/catalog), such as a [dynamic website](https://console.cloud.google.com/freetrial?redirectPath=/products/solutions/details/dynamic-web-app), [load-balanced VM](https://console.cloud.google.com/freetrial?redirectPath=/products/solutions/details/load-balanced-vms), [three tier web app](https://console.cloud.google.com/freetrial?redirectPath=/products/solutions/details/three-tier-web-app?), and [more](https://console.cloud.google.com/freetrial?redirectPath=/products/solutions/catalog).

## 20+ products with free tier

Get free usage of [AI APIs](https://console.cloud.google.com/freetrial?redirectPath=/vertex-ai/generative), [Compute Engine](https://console.cloud.google.com/freetrial/?redirectPath=/compute/), [BigQuery](https://console.cloud.google.com/freetrial/?redirectPath=/bigquery/), and other popular products [up to monthly limits](https://cloud.google.com/free/docs/free-cloud-features)—not charged against your $300 free credit.
